code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut longest_start = 0
mut longest_len = 0
mut current_start = 0
mut current_len = 0
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_boundary = false
  if i == n
    is_boundary = true
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_boundary = true
    end
  end

  if is_boundary
    if current_len > longest_len
      longest_start = current_start
      longest_len = current_len
    end
    current_start = i + 1
    current_len = 0
  else
    current_len = current_len + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let longest = string.substring(line, longest_start, longest_start + longest_len)
println("longest=#{longest}")
